programmes.show_description: This is BBC Radio 5 Sports Extra - bringing you even more live commentaries from the world's greatest sporting events. Listen on BBC Sounds.
Kevin Howells presents live ball-by-ball cricket commentary from the County Championship.
Live rugby league commentary from BBC Radio Humberside of Hull Kingston Rovers v Hull FC in the Super League Rivals Round.
Live rugby league commentary of St Helens v Wigan Warriors in the Super League Rivals Round.
Kevin Howells presents live ball-by-ball cricket commentary from the County Championship.

Live rugby union commentary of Northampton Saints v Castres in the last 16 of the European Champions Cup.
